name: Bombe Washing Station
description: Located in the high-altitude Bensa region of Sidama, the Bombe station works with thousands of smallholder farmers to process exceptional specialty lots.

name: Chelelektu Cooperative
description: One of the most famous cooperatives in Yirgacheffe, known for its consistent quality and clean, floral profiles.

name: Hambella Wamena Station
description: At the forefront of Guji specialty coffee, Hambella Wamena specializes in high-quality natural processing methods.

name: Bensa Station
description: A premier washing station in Sidama focused on high-density heirloom varieties and precise fermentation control.

name: Harar Regional Collective
description: Supporting traditional sun-drying methods on house-top trays, Harar coffee remains one of the world's most unique flavor profiles.

name: Gera Forest Farm
description: Grown in the shade of natural forests, Gera's Limu lots are prized for their balanced cup and environmental stewardship.
